title: District Hospital Balod Radiologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: District Hospital Balod has released the official Radiologist Notification 2026 at the official website balod.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the District Hospital Balod Radiologist Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 70 years with a qualification of MD/DNB/DMRD in Radiology can apply through email mode and attend the walk-in process on 29 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

basic_details.job_title: District Hospital Balod Radiologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: District Hospital Balod has released the official Radiologist Notification 2026 at the official website balod.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the District Hospital Balod Radiologist Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 70 years with a qualification of MD/DNB/DMRD in Radiology can apply through email mode and attend the walk-in process on 29 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 70 years

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Hospital Balod Radiologist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Hospital Balod Radiologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Radiologist post is 29 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Radiologist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Radiologist position will receive a salary of Rs. 200000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Radiologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD/DNB/DMRD in Radiology to be eligible for the Radiologist position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Radiologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Radiologist post is between 18 years and 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the District Hospital Balod Radiologist job?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure you follow the instructions provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Radiologist role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Radiologist position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Radiologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Radiologist post at District Hospital Balod.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the District Hospital Balod located?
faq.answer: District Hospital Balod is located in Balod, Chhattisgarh.
